scope: custom: combat + derived_stats -- R6 equal-value re-sweep (armature reset 2026-05-29)
note: Equal-value re-sweep wiring R5's Str leverage + recomposed Stamina into the decisive phrase, six-attribute (Agi/Str/End/Reading/Spirit). STATUS: IN-PROGRESS HARNESS, NOT A PARITY VERDICT. Single-loadout traces show Str's new channels WORK (Str beats Agi 2072-927; in its heavy-blunt-vs-plate niche 2666-331), but the field-rate aggregate is confounded by loadout-averaging + shared-weapon symmetry (when both fighters share a loadout the armour-defeat/weapon terms cancel), so the field numbers (Str 6.6%) are NOT trustworthy as an equal-value verdict yet. The harness needs per-loadout isolation + asymmetric-loadout handling before its field rates mean anything. Committed for continuity, explicitly flagged. Reuses R1/R2/R5/M5/M7 (already ledgered) + Class-M sweep params + Class-A budget.

entries.quoted_text: decisive sub-action Ob = 3 (Difficult); degree band is canonical.
trials per matchup at M8/M8b harness scale.
a heavy/committed action every Nth sub-action -- harness mix parameter, not a game constant.
